::: {.hidden}
$
\providecommand{\realsnn}{ \mathbb{R}^{n\times n} }
\providecommand{\realsmn}{ \mathbb{R}^{m\times n} }
\providecommand{\realsn}{ \mathbb{R}^n }
\providecommand{\reals}{ \mathbb{R} }

\providecommand{\trans}[1]{ #1^\top }
\providecommand{\hermit}[1]{ \overline{#1}^\top }
\providecommand{\inner}[2]{\langle #1, #2 \rangle}
\providecommand{\identity}{ \mathbb{I} }

\providecommand{\Mnn}{ \mathcal{M}_{n\times n} }
\providecommand{\Mmn}{ \mathcal{M}_{m\times n} }
\providecommand{\MCnn}{ \mathcal{M}(\mathbb{C})_{n\times n} }
\providecommand{\MRnn}{ \mathcal{M}(\mathbb{R})_{n\times n} }
$
:::
